strengths: 6+ years experience requirement comfortably met with full-stack work across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at current role aligns with the AI agent development requirement
Long track record building testable systems with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practices
concerns: No demonstrated Nest.js experience in the resume despite it being a core part of the primary stack
Kotlin is absent from the skills list and employment history, leaving the secondary backend language unaddressed
Testing experience leans on Jest/Selenium/custom D-lang tooling; Vitest and Playwright proficiency is not evidenced
response.justification: The candidate's stack history skews heavily toward Node.js, React, and a long tail of DLang work, but the role's named primary framework (Nest.js) and secondary language (Kotlin/Java) are not evidenced anywhere in the resume. Testing expertise is real but rooted in Jest, Selenium, and bespoke D-lang frameworks rather than the Vitest/Playwright tooling explicitly required. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz with no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes-in-production signal beyond a self-hosted open-source project, and the AI-agent exposure is recent and thinly described. Taken together, the gaps in the listed primary stack make this a weak fit for the specified role.
